title: armeria elongata var. purpurea
intro: Armeria elongata var. purpurea, also known as the Western Thistle or Purple Western Thistle, is a flowering plant species native to the western United States and Canada. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Armeria elongata var. purpurea are said to include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Armeria elongata var. purpurea can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or tincture for medicinal purposes, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
